title: BigBear.ai Finalizes $250M Acquisition of Ask Sage
text: BigBear.ai (NYSE: BBAI) has successfully finalized its acquisition of Ask Sage for $250 million in cash, the company announced on December 31, 2025. Ask Sage is a generative AI platform engineered for secure deployment across defense, intelligence, and regulated sectors. The platform currently serves over 100,000 users within 16,000 government teams and numerous commercial organizations. CEO Kevin McAleenan stated: Completing the acquisition of Ask Sage marks a significant milestone for BigBear.ai and accelerates our vision. He emphasized that the combined offering delivers AI that is not only powerful, but trusted, scalable, and ready for real-world missions. The integration expands BigBear.ai's AI capabilities to include secure generative workflows while maintaining customer control over data sovereignty, model governance, and security protocols. The company expects the acquisition to strengthen growth in national security, defense, intelligence, and commercial regulated markets. Ask Sage's technology encompasses both commercial and open-source large language models with robust security features designed specifically for public sector and defense industrial base applications.
